scripts.deploy:sepolia: npx tsc --project tsconfig.hardhat.json && npx hardhat run dist-hardhat/scripts/deploy.js --network base-sepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet: npx tsc --project tsconfig.hardhat.json && npx hardhat run dist-hardhat/scripts/deploy.js --network base-mainnet
scripts.flush-nonces: npx tsc --project tsconfig.hardhat.json && npx hardhat run dist-hardhat/scripts/flush-nonces.js --network base-sepolia
scripts.deploy:step: npx tsc --project tsconfig.hardhat.json && npx hardhat run dist-hardhat/scripts/deploy-step.js --network base-sepolia
